title: 竞媒小动态

items.title: Symphony + Reference to Video
items.summaryEn: TikTok is making Symphony AI video generation more controllable, a useful competitor signal for CPG categories with many SKUs and fast creative cycles.
items.summaryZh: TikTok 提升 Symphony AI 视频生成的可控性，对 SKU 多、素材更新快的 CPG 品类具有竞媒参考价值。
